headline.angle: Be the generalist who owns a whole brand system, not a specialist in one surface.
headline.why: Most sponsors in this role are small in-house teams hiring one person to cover everything.

skills_to_demonstrate.grounding: graphic (22 employers) is the largest recurring title token
skills_to_demonstrate.evidence_in_your_work: The Rally case study shows research notes and two rounds of iteration.
Typography and palette are defined across the beauty-shop redesign.

skills_to_demonstrate.skill: Working solo inside a small team
skills_to_demonstrate.grounding: 75 of 76 employers use the in-house placement model

one_thing_to_work_on.recommendation: Extend the in-progress project into a full brand system rather than starting something new.
one_thing_to_work_on.why: It already proves the harder half; the missing half is what this market pays for.
one_thing_to_work_on.how_it_signals: A skimming reviewer sees one coherent system, and it advances headline.angle.
one_thing_to_work_on.current_work_note: The evidenced skills can be emphasised through the current project, so it stays the vehicle.

distinctive_edge.evidence: Adjacent markets reward written articulation of design rationale.
distinctive_edge.why_it_could_matter: It separates a portfolio from visually similar ones a reviewer sees the same day.

company_notes.signal_in_filings: 2 filings across 2 quarters, SOC 27-1024, median wage $60,000, worksite NY.
company_notes.researched_context: Small in-house team covering brand and marketing surfaces.

company_notes.signal_in_filings: 1 filing, FY2026Q1, SOC 27-1024, single wage point $62,400.

what_to_know.point: An LCA certification is not a hire or an open role.
what_to_know.detail: Each row is a certified filing, not a job posting.

what_to_know.point: This pool skews toward one occupation.
what_to_know.detail: 42 of 95 filings sit in the largest SOC bucket.
